title: Zenith Project
description: Official modpack for the Zenith Project MC server. This modpack is purely for visual aesthetic and performance. This is not required to play on the server
body:
[Website](https://zenithproject.gg/) | [Discord](discord.gg/zenithproject)

This modpack is for the Zenith Project MC server and provide the intended look for the server. This is purely for visual aesthetic and better performance on the server and is not a required modpack.

**What does this modpack provide?**

It comes with two shaderpacks namely, Complimentary Shaders Reimagined and Unbound. It also includes Iris shaders mod which adds compatibility with OptiFine shaders. Sodium is also included for its powerdull rendering engine as well as its optimization.

For any help regarding this modpack please feel free to join the discord and reach out to an MC developer!


<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>
  
- [Complimentary Shaders Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) by EminGT (Intended look for the server #1)
  
- [Complimentary Shaders Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) by EminGT (Intended look for the server #2)
  
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by coderbot & IMS (A modern shaders mod for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs)
  
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by jellysquid3 & IMS (Sodium is a powerful rendering engine and optimization mod for Minecraft)


</details>
